you know what would be nice? to have pc archeologist show me a running tally of all the tokens we are using -- can we do that?
Implemented a live token/cost tally in pc archeologist for both TUI and line-log modes, noting there are pre-existing uncommitted changes from a concurrent session in the same file.

Flagged that the file contains two sets of uncommitted changes (the token-tally feature and a pre-existing lazy-picker refactor) and asked the user to choose between committing everything together, staging only the token-tally changes, or leaving the refactor unstaged.
